title: A Cobblemon Pack
description: The Best Cobblemon Expansion Pack made by Ancan_322
body:
## **🧩 Overview**
**Looking for a Vanilla-friendly Cobblemon experience?
This is the ultimate modpack for players who want a Cobblemon Vanilla-like experience with the thrill of catching 'em all!**

**Note: If this modpack recieves enough attention, I'm gonna keep updating it with new content and create a discord server so stay tuned!**

## **🐾 Features**
- 📦 1000+ Pokémon to catch, including Legendary and Mythical species
  
- 📢 Includes all Mega and Dynamax evolutions!
  
- 🌍 40+ custom biomes for immersive exploration
  
- 🏰 30+ structures added across all dimensions
  
- 🔥 Full support for the Overworld, Nether, and End
  
- 🧬 Carefully curated mix of popular and underrated Cobblemon add-ons

## **🌐 Dimensions**
Explore the three main Minecraft dimensions with Pokémon appearing in each one!


## **🧠 Why this pack?**
Unlike many heavy modpacks, this one keeps things lightweight and Vanilla-like, while still offering tons of content and surprises. Whether you're a casual player or a experienced player, this pack has something for everyone!
